use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and interfaces
Destructive actions like delete or remove operations
Ghost-style buttons for subtle UI patterns
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbars and navigation
ai_summary: A versatile, accessible button component built with Radix UI Slot for composition and class-variance-authority for flexible styling. Supports multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, small, large, icon) for consistent UI patterns across applications.
